I attempted to write to an external file path outside the allowed workspace, triggering a policy denial error.  

**What I’ll do differently:**

I’ll also structure the abstract strictly in 3 sentences, explicitly stating the problem (identity coherence in structured tasks), the novel approach (MHE), and the metric (HIRO score), avoiding unnecessary jargon or deviations.
